message:
test(core): add property-based tests for search daemon protocol

Adds proptest-driven validation for the search daemon's wire protocol
covering DaemonRequest, DaemonResponse, EmbedRequest, and EmbedResponse
round-trip serialization. Verifies field preservation through
serialize/deserialize cycles and enforces size limit constraints on
encode operations.

Bead: ft-3i6bf

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
